name: Dwarka Expressway (NPR)
description: 29km expressway connecting Dwarka to Gurgaon, expected to boost realty prices 20-30%.

name: RRTS Delhi-Gurgaon-SNB Corridor
description: Regional Rapid Transit System connecting Delhi, Gurgaon, and SNB with high-speed rail.

name: Global City IT Hub — Sector 36B
description: 1000-acre integrated township with IT park, residential zones, and commercial hub.

name: SPR (Southern Peripheral Road) Extension
description: Extension of SPR improving connectivity to Sohna and New Gurgaon sectors.

name: Sewage Treatment Plant — Sector 107
description: 100 MLD capacity STP serving new sectors along Dwarka Expressway.

name: Mumbai Metro Line 3 (Aqua Line)
description: 33.5km underground metro from Colaba to SEEPZ connecting major business hubs.

name: Navi Mumbai International Airport (NMIA)
description: New international airport expected to transform Panvel-Ulwe realty market.

name: Mumbai Trans-Harbour Link (MTHL/Atal Setu)
description: 21.8km sea bridge connecting Mumbai to Navi Mumbai, cutting travel time to 20 minutes.

name: Virar-Alibaug Multimodal Corridor
description: 126km corridor improving north-south Mumbai connectivity.

name: Thane Creek Sewage Infrastructure
description: Upgraded sewage and water supply network for Thane-Dombivli growth corridor.

name: Hyderabad Regional Ring Road (RRR)
description: 340km outer ring connecting Sangareddy, Nalgonda, and Medak.

name: Hyderabad Pharma City SEZ
description: 19,333-acre pharma manufacturing hub near Mucherla.

name: Metro Rail Phase-II Extension
description: Extending metro to Airport, Shamshabad, and Old City areas.

name: Outer Ring Road Service Roads & Junctions
description: Service road improvements and grade separators on ORR.

name: HMWSSB Water Grid Phase-3
description: Piped water supply expansion to 50+ peripheral localities.

name: East-West Metro Extension (Howrah-Salt Lake)
description: 16.6km underground metro connecting Howrah Maidan to Salt Lake Sector V.

name: Joka-BBD Bagh Metro (Purple Line)
description: Extended metro line improving south Kolkata connectivity.

name: New Town IT Hub Expansion
description: Expansion of Rajarhat New Town IT corridor with new office parks.

name: Diamond Harbour Road Flyover Complex
description: Multi-lane flyover reducing Behala-CBD commute time.

name: East Kolkata Wetlands Sewage Modernization
description: Modernized waste treatment protecting wetland ecosystem while serving eastern suburbs.
